archetype_description: Been let down before. Deeply cautious about trusting a new provider.
data_note: Only 0 entries with this archetype assigned. Profiler has not run on most entries — scores will improve as Lead Psychology Profiler processes more leads.

meeting_guidance.opening_approach: Ask what happened with their previous manager/agent. Let them tell the story in full.
meeting_guidance.what_to_lead_with: Transparency about Stayful's model. Contract terms, what's in writing, what guarantees exist.
meeting_guidance.what_to_avoid: Promises that can't be guaranteed. 'We never let anyone down' when they've been burned before.
meeting_guidance.close_approach: Contract walkthrough on the call. 'Let me show you exactly what's in the agreement so there are no surprises.'
meeting_guidance.offer_framing: Lead with contract clarity before price. 'The most important thing is that you understand exactly what you're signing.'

delay_signal_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
green_light_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
